privileged_info_summary: The task operates on historical emails from the SpamAssassin Public Corpus. Exactly 11 emails with the '[ILUG]' (Irish Linux Users Group) tag are dynamically loaded by the setup script. I verified all task instructions and metadata fields (such as 'ILUG-Events', '[ILUG]', '/home/ga/Documents/ilug_count.txt', and 'travel-approvals@company.com') perfectly match the verifier logic. The target email to be forwarded is the most recent ILUG email loaded: 'Re: [ILUG] eircoms adsl modems', sent on Thu, 29 Aug 2002.
